title: Tensura EP and Evolving Armour, Tools and Weapons
description: Adds EP to armour tools and weapons and evolvution.  Also includes support for some mods.
body:
Currently this mod supports all vanilla armour and tools into low magisteel/leather into monster leather, shield into upgraded tensura shields.  It also evolves weapons added by tensura to low magisteel and the rest of the items that don't have ep in base tensura.
Current mods supported that add EP and Evolving are Simply Swords, Cisco's Content/Armoury, Ice and Fire, and Gobber.

First number is requirement to evolve/max ep second is min EP after evolved
Armour

Vanilla/Tensura 

Leather (1k, 0) -> Monster Leather D (2.5k, 1k) -> C (5k, 2.5k) -> B (8k, 5k) -> A (80k, 8k) -> Special A  

Gold (1.5k, 0)-> Chainmail (3k, 1.5k) -> Iron (4k, 3k) -> Diamond (5k, 4k) -> Netherite (6k, 5k) -> Low Magisteel 

Shield (6k, 0) -> Armoursaurus Shield (60k, 6k) -> Tempest Scale Shield 

Silver (5k, 0)

Serpent Scalemail (5k, 0)

Modded 

Cisco Content/Armoury
Hero (20k, 0), Cisco (20k, 0), Fallen Hero (20k, 0), Windwalker (20k, 0), Gilded Eagle (20k, 0), Brightsteel (20k, 0), Fell King (20k, 0), Adventurer (20k, 0), Ascendant Azure (20k, 0), 
Ascendant Violet (20k, 0), Ascendant Rouge (20k, 0), Bjorn (20k, 0), Sylvi (20k, 0), Darksteel (20k, 0)

Gobber

First number is requirement to evolve/max ep second is min EP after evolved

Flint and Steel Does not evolve (0, 500)
